features: Smells great with effective deodorant protection
Keeps you smelling great all day or all night
Blend of caramel, coconut, and hazelnut notes
Experience the Axe effect anytime, anywhere.
description: Product description Spray to Excite Female Friends Start using AXE Body Spray, Excite to smell great all day, all night. This exotic spray is a unique all-over deodorant body spray that combines a quality fragrance with effective deodorant protection. It helps to reduce odors and keeps you fragrant throughout the day. Long lasting fragrance Effective deodorant protection Can be applied anytime or anywhere Evolves into a lingering aroma This body spray is a blend of caramel, coconut and hazelnut notes that smells great and gives effective protection. It has a seductive fragrance. Ingredients SD Alcohol 40B, Hydrofluorobarbon 152A, Fragrance (Parfum), Polyaminopropyl Biguanide Stearate. Directions Clean and dry the armpit before use. Hold the spray about 15 cm away and spray a thin, even layer on the armpit. Allow the deodorant spray to dry completely before putting on clothes. Repeat application as needed during the day or after physical activity for fresh, odorless protection. See more
